minecraft:story/root.name: Minecraft
minecraft:story/root.desc: The heart and story of the game
minecraft:story/root.req: Have a crafting table in the inventory.

minecraft:story/mine_stone.name: Stone Age
minecraft:story/mine_stone.desc: Mine stone with your new pickaxe

minecraft:story/smelt_iron.name: Acquire Hardware
minecraft:story/smelt_iron.req: Have an iron ingot in the inventory.

minecraft:story/obtain_armor.name: Suit Up
minecraft:story/obtain_armor.desc: Protect yourself with a piece of iron armor
minecraft:story/obtain_armor.req: Put on any piece of Iron Armor.

minecraft:story/deflect_arrow.name: Not Today, Thank You
minecraft:story/deflect_arrow.desc: Deflect a projectile with a shield
minecraft:story/deflect_arrow.req: Block an arrow or other projectile with a shield.

minecraft:story/mine_diamond.name: Diamonds!
minecraft:story/mine_diamond.req: Have a Diamond in your inventory.

minecraft:story/enter_the_nether.name: We Need to Go Deeper
minecraft:story/enter_the_nether.desc: Build, light, and enter a Nether portal

minecraft:story/shiny_gear.name: Cover Me with Diamonds
minecraft:story/shiny_gear.req: Have any piece of Diamond Armor.

minecraft:story/enchant_item.name: Enchanter
minecraft:story/enchant_item.desc: Enchant an item at an Enchanting Table
minecraft:story/enchant_item.req: Use an Enchanting Table on an item.

minecraft:story/cure_zombie_villager.name: Zombie Doctor
minecraft:story/cure_zombie_villager.desc: Weaken and then cure a zombie villager
minecraft:story/cure_zombie_villager.req: Use a Golden Apple on a weakened Zombie Villager.

minecraft:nether/return_to_sender.name: Return to Sender
minecraft:nether/return_to_sender.desc: Destroy a Ghast with a fireball
minecraft:nether/return_to_sender.req: Kill a Ghast with its own fireball.

minecraft:nether/obtain_ancient_debris.name: Hidden in the Depths
minecraft:nether/obtain_ancient_debris.req: Have Ancient Debris in your inventory.

minecraft:nether/fast_travel.name: Subspace Bubble
minecraft:nether/fast_travel.desc: Use the Nether to travel 7km in the Overworld
minecraft:nether/fast_travel.req: Travel 7000 blocks in the Overworld using the Nether.

minecraft:nether/find_fortress.name: A Terrible Fortress
minecraft:nether/find_fortress.desc: Break your way into a Nether Fortress

minecraft:nether/obtain_crying_obsidian.name: Who is Cutting Onions?
minecraft:nether/obtain_crying_obsidian.req: Have Crying Obsidian in your inventory.

minecraft:nether/distract_piglin.name: Oh Shiny
minecraft:nether/distract_piglin.req: Give a Piglin gold while it is aggravated.

minecraft:nether/ride_strider.name: This Boat Has Legs
minecraft:nether/ride_strider.desc: Ride a Strider with a Warped Fungus on a Stick
minecraft:nether/ride_strider.req: Ride a Strider and use fungus to boost its speed.

minecraft:nether/uneasy_alliance.name: Uneasy Alliance
minecraft:nether/uneasy_alliance.desc: Rescue a Ghast from the Nether
minecraft:nether/uneasy_alliance.req: Kill a Ghast while it is in the Overworld.

minecraft:nether/loot_bastion.name: War Pigs
minecraft:nether/loot_bastion.desc: Loot a chest in a Bastion Remnant
minecraft:nether/loot_bastion.req: Open a chest in a Bastion Remnant.

minecraft:nether/netherite_armor.name: Cover Me in Debris
minecraft:nether/netherite_armor.desc: Get a full suit of Netherite armor
minecraft:nether/netherite_armor.req: Have a full set of Netherite armor in your inventory.

minecraft:nether/get_wither_skull.name: Spooky Scary Skeleton
minecraft:nether/get_wither_skull.req: Have a Wither Skeleton Skull in your inventory.

minecraft:nether/obtain_blaze_rod.name: Into Fire
minecraft:nether/obtain_blaze_rod.desc: Relieve a Blaze of its rod
minecraft:nether/obtain_blaze_rod.req: Have a Blaze Rod in your inventory.

minecraft:nether/charge_respawn_anchor.name: Not Quite "Nine" Lives
minecraft:nether/charge_respawn_anchor.desc: Charge a Respawn Anchor to the maximum
minecraft:nether/charge_respawn_anchor.req: Fully charge a Respawn Anchor with Glowstone.

minecraft:nether/ride_strider_in_overwor.name: Feels Like Home
minecraft:nether/ride_strider_in_overwor.desc: Take a Strider for a long ride on lava in the Overworld
minecraft:nether/ride_strider_in_overwor.req: Travel 50 blocks on Overworld lava while riding a Strider.

minecraft:nether/brew_potion.name: Local Brewery
minecraft:nether/brew_potion.req: Pick up a potion from a Brewing Stand.

minecraft:nether/all_potions.name: A Furious Cocktail
minecraft:nether/all_potions.desc: Have every potion effect applied at the same time
minecraft:nether/all_potions.req: Have all 13 primary potion effects active simultaneously.

minecraft:nether/create_full_beacon.name: Beaconator
minecraft:nether/create_full_beacon.desc: Bring a Beacon to full power
minecraft:nether/create_full_beacon.req: Power a Beacon with a 4-layer pyramid.

minecraft:nether/all_effects.name: How Did We Get Here?
minecraft:nether/all_effects.desc: Have every effect applied at the same time
minecraft:nether/all_effects.req: Have all 30+ possible status effects active at once.

minecraft:end/dragon_egg.name: The Next Generation
minecraft:end/dragon_egg.req: Have the Dragon Egg in your inventory.

minecraft:end/enter_end_gateway.name: Remote Gateway
minecraft:end/enter_end_gateway.req: Enter an End Gateway to reach the outer islands.

minecraft:end/respawn_dragon.name: The End... Again...
minecraft:end/respawn_dragon.req: Use End Crystals to summon the dragon again.

minecraft:end/dragon_breath.name: You Need a Mint
minecraft:end/dragon_breath.desc: Collect dragon's breath in a glass bottle
minecraft:end/dragon_breath.req: Bottle the purple breath from the Ender Dragon.

minecraft:end/find_end_city.name: City at the End of the Game
minecraft:end/find_end_city.desc: Go on in, what could happen?

minecraft:end/levitate.name: Great View From Up Here
minecraft:end/levitate.desc: Levitate up 50 blocks from Shulker attacks
minecraft:end/levitate.req: Use Shulker bullets to float high into the air.

minecraft:adventure/root.name: Adventure
minecraft:adventure/root.req: Kill any mob or be killed by one.

minecraft:adventure/voluntary_exile.name: Voluntary Exile
minecraft:adventure/voluntary_exile.req: Kill a Pillager Captain with a banner.

minecraft:adventure/hero_of_the_village.name: Hero of the Village
minecraft:adventure/hero_of_the_village.desc: Successfully defend a village from a raid

minecraft:adventure/kill_a_mob.name: Monster Hunter
minecraft:adventure/kill_a_mob.req: Kill one of the many hostile mobs.

minecraft:adventure/kill_all_mobs.name: Monsters Hunted
minecraft:adventure/kill_all_mobs.desc: Kill one of every hostile monster

minecraft:adventure/sniper_duel.name: Sniper Duel
minecraft:adventure/sniper_duel.desc: Kill a Skeleton from at least 50 meters away
minecraft:adventure/sniper_duel.req: Kill a skeleton with a bow from a distance.

minecraft:adventure/bullseye.name: Bullseye
minecraft:adventure/bullseye.desc: Hit the bullseye of a Target block from 30m
minecraft:adventure/bullseye.req: Hit a Target block's center from a distance.

minecraft:adventure/lighten_up.name: Lighten Up
minecraft:adventure/lighten_up.desc: Scrape a copper bulb with an axe
minecraft:adventure/lighten_up.req: Use an axe on a Copper Bulb to increase light.

minecraft:adventure/who_needs_rockets.name: Who Needs Rockets?
minecraft:adventure/who_needs_rockets.desc: Launch yourself 8 blocks up with a Wind Charge
minecraft:adventure/who_needs_rockets.req: Use a Wind Charge to jump high.

minecraft:adventure/blowback.name: Blowback
minecraft:adventure/blowback.desc: Kill a Breeze with its own Wind Charge
minecraft:adventure/blowback.req: Reflect a Breeze's projectile back at it.

minecraft:adventure/under_lock_and_key.name: Under Lock and Key
minecraft:adventure/under_lock_and_key.desc: Use a Trial Key on a Vault

minecraft:adventure/revaulting.name: Revaulting
minecraft:adventure/revaulting.desc: Use an Ominous Trial Key on an Ominous Vault

minecraft:adventure/overoverkill.name: Over-Overkill
minecraft:adventure/overoverkill.desc: Deal 50 hearts of damage in a single hit
minecraft:adventure/overoverkill.req: Deal 50 hearts of damage in one hit with a Mace.

minecraft:adventure/trade.name: What a Deal!
minecraft:adventure/trade.req: Trade with a Villager or Wandering Trader.

minecraft:adventure/sleep_in_bed.name: Sweet Dreams
minecraft:adventure/sleep_in_bed.desc: Sleep in a Bed to change your respawn point

minecraft:adventure/play_jukebox_in_mead.name: Sound of Music
minecraft:adventure/play_jukebox_in_mead.desc: Make the Meadows come alive with music
minecraft:adventure/play_jukebox_in_mead.req: Play a Music Disc in a Jukebox in a Meadow biome.

minecraft:adventure/walk_on_powder_snow_.name: Light as a Rabbit
minecraft:adventure/walk_on_powder_snow_.desc: Walk on Powder Snow... without sinking
minecraft:adventure/walk_on_powder_snow_.req: Walk on Powder Snow while wearing Leather Boots.

minecraft:adventure/spyglass_at_parrot.name: Is It a Bird?
minecraft:adventure/spyglass_at_parrot.desc: Look at a Parrot through a Spyglass
minecraft:adventure/spyglass_at_parrot.req: Use a Spyglass to look at a Parrot.

minecraft:adventure/spyglass_at_ghast.name: Is It a Balloon?
minecraft:adventure/spyglass_at_ghast.desc: Look at a Ghast through a Spyglass
minecraft:adventure/spyglass_at_ghast.req: Use a Spyglass to look at a Ghast.

minecraft:adventure/spyglass_at_dragon.name: Is It a Plane?
minecraft:adventure/spyglass_at_dragon.desc: Look at the Ender Dragon through a Spyglass
minecraft:adventure/spyglass_at_dragon.req: Use a Spyglass to look at the Ender Dragon.

minecraft:adventure/fall_from_world_heig.name: Caves & Cliffs
minecraft:adventure/fall_from_world_heig.desc: Free fall from the top to the bottom of the world
minecraft:adventure/fall_from_world_heig.req: Fall from Y=319 to Y=-59 and survive.

minecraft:adventure/trade_at_world_heigh.name: Star Trader
minecraft:adventure/trade_at_world_heigh.desc: Trade with a Villager at the build height limit
minecraft:adventure/trade_at_world_heigh.req: Trade with a Villager at Y=318 or higher.

minecraft:adventure/trim_with_any_armor_.name: Crafting a New Look
minecraft:adventure/trim_with_any_armor_.desc: Craft a trimmed armor at a Smithing Table
minecraft:adventure/trim_with_any_armor_.req: Use a Smithing Template to trim armor.

minecraft:adventure/trim_with_all_exclus.name: Smithing with Style
minecraft:adventure/trim_with_all_exclus.desc: Apply all exclusive smithing templates at least once
minecraft:adventure/trim_with_all_exclus.req: Apply Spire, Snout, Rib, Ward, Silence, Vex, Tide, and Wayfinder trims.

minecraft:adventure/salvage_sherd.name: Respecting the Remnants
minecraft:adventure/salvage_sherd.desc: Brush a Suspicious block to obtain a Pottery Sherd
minecraft:adventure/salvage_sherd.req: Use a Brush on Suspicious Sand or Gravel.

minecraft:adventure/craft_decorated_pot_.name: Careful Restoration
minecraft:adventure/craft_decorated_pot_.desc: Make a Decorated Pot out of 4 Pottery Sherds
minecraft:adventure/craft_decorated_pot_.req: Craft a Decorated Pot using 4 Sherds.

minecraft:adventure/avoid_vibration.name: Sneak 100
minecraft:adventure/avoid_vibration.desc: Sneak near a Sculk Sensor or Warden
minecraft:adventure/avoid_vibration.req: Sneak near a Sculk Sensor or Warden without being detected.

minecraft:adventure/kill_mob_near_sculk_.name: It Spreads
minecraft:adventure/kill_mob_near_sculk_.desc: Kill a mob near a Sculk Catalyst
minecraft:adventure/kill_mob_near_sculk_.req: Kill a mob that drops XP near a Sculk Catalyst.

minecraft:adventure/throw_trident.name: A Throwaway Joke
minecraft:adventure/throw_trident.req: Hit a mob with a thrown Trident.

minecraft:adventure/very_very_frightenin.name: Very Very Frightening
minecraft:adventure/very_very_frightenin.req: Use a Channeling Trident to strike a Villager with lightning.

minecraft:adventure/shoot_arrow.name: Take Aim
minecraft:adventure/shoot_arrow.req: Hit a mob with an arrow from a Bow or Crossbow.

minecraft:adventure/totem_of_undying.name: Postmortal
minecraft:adventure/totem_of_undying.desc: Use a Totem of Undying to cheat death

minecraft:adventure/two_birds_one_arrow.name: Two Birds, One Arrow
minecraft:adventure/two_birds_one_arrow.desc: Kill two Phantoms with a piercing Arrow
minecraft:adventure/two_birds_one_arrow.req: Use a Piercing Crossbow to kill 2 Phantoms with one shot.

minecraft:adventure/whos_the_pillager_no.name: Who's the Pillager Now?
minecraft:adventure/whos_the_pillager_no.desc: Give a Pillager a taste of their own medicine
minecraft:adventure/whos_the_pillager_no.req: Kill a Pillager with a Crossbow.

minecraft:adventure/arbalistic.name: Arbalistic
minecraft:adventure/arbalistic.desc: Kill five unique mobs with one crossbow shot
minecraft:adventure/arbalistic.req: Use a Piercing Crossbow to kill 5 different mob types at once.

minecraft:adventure/honey_block_slide.name: Sticky Situation
minecraft:adventure/honey_block_slide.desc: Jump into a Honey Block to break your fall
minecraft:adventure/honey_block_slide.req: Slide down the side of a Honey Block.

minecraft:adventure/lightning_rod_with_v.name: Surge Protector
minecraft:adventure/lightning_rod_with_v.desc: Protect a Villager from lightning without starting a fire
minecraft:adventure/lightning_rod_with_v.req: Have a Lightning Rod protect a Villager.

minecraft:adventure/use_lodestone.name: Country Lode, Take Me Home
minecraft:adventure/use_lodestone.desc: Use a Compass on a Lodestone
minecraft:adventure/use_lodestone.req: Use a Compass on a Lodestone.

minecraft:husbandry/root.name: Husbandry
minecraft:husbandry/root.desc: The world is full of friends and food
minecraft:husbandry/root.req: Eat anything or drink a potion.

minecraft:husbandry/safely_harvest_honey.name: Bee Our Guest
minecraft:husbandry/safely_harvest_honey.desc: Use a Campfire to collect Honey
minecraft:husbandry/safely_harvest_honey.req: Collect honey from a hive with a campfire underneath.

minecraft:husbandry/bred_all_animals.name: Two by Two
minecraft:husbandry/bred_all_animals.req: Breed all 20+ types of breedable animals.

minecraft:husbandry/plant_seed.name: A Seedy Place
minecraft:husbandry/plant_seed.desc: Plant a seed and watch it grow
minecraft:husbandry/plant_seed.req: Plant a seed in tilled soil.

minecraft:husbandry/fishy_business.name: Fishy Business
minecraft:husbandry/fishy_business.req: Catch any fish with a Fishing Rod.

minecraft:husbandry/tactical_fishing.name: Tactical Fishing
minecraft:husbandry/tactical_fishing.desc: Catch a Fish ... without a Fishing Rod!
minecraft:husbandry/tactical_fishing.req: Catch a fish using a bucket.

minecraft:husbandry/silk_touch_nest.name: Total Beelocation
minecraft:husbandry/silk_touch_nest.desc: Move a Bee Nest with 3 bees inside
minecraft:husbandry/silk_touch_nest.req: Use Silk Touch to pick up a populated Bee Nest.

minecraft:husbandry/axolotl_in_a_bucket.name: The Cutest Predator
minecraft:husbandry/axolotl_in_a_bucket.desc: Catch an Axolotl in a Bucket
minecraft:husbandry/axolotl_in_a_bucket.req: Use a Water Bucket on an Axolotl.

minecraft:husbandry/kill_axolotl_target.name: The Healing Power of Friendship!
minecraft:husbandry/kill_axolotl_target.desc: Team up with an axolotl and win a fight
minecraft:husbandry/kill_axolotl_target.req: Kill a mob that an Axolotl is attacking.

minecraft:husbandry/make_a_sign_glow.name: Glow and Behold!
minecraft:husbandry/make_a_sign_glow.desc: Make the text of any kind of sign glow
minecraft:husbandry/make_a_sign_glow.req: Use a Glow Ink Sac on a Sign.

minecraft:husbandry/wax_on.name: Wax On
minecraft:husbandry/wax_on.desc: Apply Honeycomb to a Copper block!
minecraft:husbandry/wax_on.req: Use a Honeycomb on any Copper block variant.

minecraft:husbandry/wax_off.name: Wax Off
minecraft:husbandry/wax_off.desc: Scrape Wax off of a Copper block!
minecraft:husbandry/wax_off.req: Use an Axe on a Waxed Copper block.

minecraft:husbandry/tadpole_in_a_bucket.name: Bukkit Bukkit
minecraft:husbandry/tadpole_in_a_bucket.desc: Catch a Tadpole in a Bucket
minecraft:husbandry/tadpole_in_a_bucket.req: Use a Water Bucket on a Tadpole.

minecraft:husbandry/leash_all_frog_varia.name: When the Squad Hops into Town
minecraft:husbandry/leash_all_frog_varia.desc: Get each Frog variant on a Lead
minecraft:husbandry/leash_all_frog_varia.req: Leash Temperate, Warm, and Cold Frog variants.

minecraft:husbandry/froglights.name: With Our Powers Combined!
minecraft:husbandry/froglights.desc: Have all Froglights in your inventory
minecraft:husbandry/froglights.req: Have Pearlescent, Ochre, and Verdant Froglights.

minecraft:husbandry/allay_deliver_item_t.name: You've Got a Friend in Me
minecraft:husbandry/allay_deliver_item_t.desc: Have an Allay deliver items to you
minecraft:husbandry/allay_deliver_item_t.req: Have an Allay bring you items.

minecraft:husbandry/allay_deliver_cake_t.name: Birthday Song
minecraft:husbandry/allay_deliver_cake_t.desc: Have an Allay drop a Cake at a Note Block
minecraft:husbandry/allay_deliver_cake_t.req: Use a Note Block to trigger an Allay dropping a Cake.

minecraft:husbandry/obtain_sniffer_egg.name: Smells Interesting
minecraft:husbandry/obtain_sniffer_egg.req: Have a Sniffer Egg in your inventory.

minecraft:husbandry/feed_snifflet.name: Little Sniffs
minecraft:husbandry/feed_snifflet.req: Feed Torchflower Seeds to a baby Sniffer.

minecraft:husbandry/plant_any_sniffer_se.name: Planting the Past
minecraft:husbandry/plant_any_sniffer_se.req: Plant Torchflower Seeds or a Pitcher Pod.

minecraft:husbandry/obtain_netherite_hoe.name: Serious Dedication
minecraft:husbandry/obtain_netherite_hoe.desc: Use a Netherite Ingot to upgrade a Hoe
minecraft:husbandry/obtain_netherite_hoe.req: Have a Netherite Hoe in your inventory.

minecraft:husbandry/ride_a_boat_with_a_g.name: Whatever Floats Your Goat!
minecraft:husbandry/ride_a_boat_with_a_g.desc: Get in a Boat and float with a Goat
minecraft:husbandry/ride_a_boat_with_a_g.req: Enter a Boat with a Goat.

minecraft:husbandry/brush_armadillo.name: Isn't It Scute?
minecraft:husbandry/brush_armadillo.desc: Get Armadillo Scutes using a Brush
minecraft:husbandry/brush_armadillo.req: Use a Brush on an Armadillo.

minecraft:husbandry/repair_wolf_armor.name: Good as New
minecraft:husbandry/repair_wolf_armor.desc: Repair damaged Wolf Armor using Armadillo Scutes
minecraft:husbandry/repair_wolf_armor.req: Repair Wolf Armor while it's equipped on a Wolf.

minecraft:husbandry/whole_pack.name: The Whole Pack
minecraft:husbandry/whole_pack.req: Tame all 9 wolf types found in different biomes.

minecraft:husbandry/remove_wolf_armor.name: Shear Brilliance
minecraft:husbandry/remove_wolf_armor.desc: Remove Wolf Armor from a Wolf using Shears
minecraft:husbandry/remove_wolf_armor.req: Use Shears on a Wolf wearing armor.
